basic_details.job_title: Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur
basic_details.short_information: Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Manager Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 5 years; Women: 10 years; Ex-Servicemen, Inter-caste marriage, etc. as per Chhattisgarh rules; Maximum age after relaxation not exceeding 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary (10+2), Computer Diploma/Degree (1 year) from recognized institute
qualification.details: Higher Secondary (10+2) passed from recognized board. 1 year Computer Diploma/Degree from a recognized institute. Resident of the society area from a tendu leaf collector family with a minimum of 500 bundles collected in at least 3 years out of the last 5 years (2021-2025).

selection_process: Computer max 5) Document Verification Police Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: bilaspur.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
